name_en: 【Top Version Factory Leather Top Quality Original with Full Counter Packaging】【Full Steel Hardware Deep Blue】 The top-quality Saint Louis shopping bag is made of GOYARDINE canvas, unlined, soft and lightweight, and can be used on both sides. The front is GOYARDINE canvas, and the other side is cotton-linen knit. Two leather handles go from thin to thick, supporting multiple carrying methods. It comes with a detachable inner bag that hangs on one of the handles for easy access.

It comes with a detachable inner bag that hangs on one of the handles for easy access.
Size:40X20X34(CM)
Main Material & Other Materials:GOYARDINE canvas CHEVROCHES calfskin
Internal Material: Linen and cotton lining
Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap: Detachable inner bag
Handle Height:21(CM)
Style: Handbag, Shoulder, Handheld
